title: Summary: Turn 28
content: Pueblo (v0.1.0) is a TypeScript CLI-first + Electron desktop code agent framework with a layered architecture: input routing → command dispatching / agent execution → LLM provider adapters (GitHub Copilot, DeepSeek) → tool layer (exec/grep/read) → SQLite persistence, and includes a built-in Pepe semantic memory system (embedding + retrieval). Key directories: `src/agent/` (task runner, supervisor/worker), `src/memory/`, `src/commands/`, `src/providers/`, `src/tools/`, and Electron desktop under `src/desktop/` with IPC contract.
